headline: Kroger Taps Chief Data And AI Officer As Shares Show Solid Momentum
summary: Kroger (NYSE:KR) has created a new role of Chief Data and AI Officer. The company appointed Milen Mahadevan, currently president of its analytics unit, to the position. The new executive will oversee all data and AI operations and lead an AI driven transformation initiative. Kroger, trading at $74.11, has seen its share price supported by multi year gains, with returns of 68.1% over 3 years and 132.4% over 5 years. Shorter term performance has also been solid, with the stock up 8.6% over...

headline: Maplebear Details AI, Ads and International Push at Morgan Stanley Event, Reiterates Buybacks
summary: Maplebear (NASDAQ:CART) executives outlined priorities around marketplace growth, enterprise retail technology, advertising, artificial intelligence, and international expansion during a discussion at a Morgan Stanley event. headline: Grocery Outlet to close dozens of stores after overexpansion
summary: Grocery Outlet, the Emeryville-based supermarket chain, is closing 36 stores as part of an optimization plan.
